title: Rock Oo! Rimba Bara Kembali
overview: Sequel of "Rock" (2005). Tells about Amy's life after he was kicked out of Rimba Bara. When Zul Kapan, the current vocalist is quit from the band for other commitment, can Amy return to replace him?
